name: Escargot Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter in a food processor until quite smooth.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and process until well blended.
3. Form the mixture into a 1-inch diameter log.
4. Wrap the log in plastic wrap and chill until firm.
5. Cut the chilled log into 1/4-inch slices.
6. Serve slightly chilled.
